title: IRGC statement: targeted 'source of acts of aggression against Lebanese civilians'; warns 'broader response encompassing all US and Israeli targets'
snippet: IRGC issued a formal statement regarding the missile attack on Ramat David Airbase. The statement said IRGC targeted 'the source of acts of aggression against Lebanese civilians' in direct retaliation for Israel's Dahieh strike. IRGC warned that 'any escalation would lead to a broader response encompassing all US and Israeli targets in the region.' This language explicitly extends the threat envelope to include US military assets, a significant expansion from previous statements focused on Israel alone. Source: Euronews.
tag_reason: IRGC formal statement with new threat expansion to include US targets — new qualitative escalation in rhetoric

entities.name: Iran Missile Attack on Ramat David (Jun 8)
